candidates.title: Perry Index of Aesopic Fables
candidates.description: Standard numbering system for Aesopic fables
candidates.usefulness: critical for cross-referencing fable numbering between editions
candidates.notes: Need to map Chambry 150 to Perry number to identify fable across sources

candidates.title: Perseus Morphological Analysis
candidates.description: Word-by-word morphological parsing for Greek text
candidates.usefulness: can provide morphology for individual words if treebank unavailable
candidates.notes: Perseus provides click-through morphology on their texts

candidates.title: Aesopic Fables Commentary and Scholarship
candidates.notes: May help understand textual variants and numbering discrepancies

candidates.title: Babrius and Phaedrus (Loeb Classical Library)
candidates.description: Verse versions of Aesopic fables by Babrius (Greek) and Phaedrus (Latin)
candidates.notes: Copyright restricted but may provide structural insights. Not for direct use.

candidates.title: Ancient Greek Tutorials - Aesop Resources
candidates.description: Educational resources using Aesop for Greek learning
candidates.usefulness: may have simplified or annotated versions
candidates.notes: Useful for understanding common pedagogical approaches

candidates.title: Aesop Fable Title Index
candidates.description: Cross-reference of fable titles and numbers across editions
candidates.usefulness: essential for identifying which fable is Chambry 150
candidates.notes: Laura Gibbs maintains comprehensive Aesop resources with cross-references
